zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Ridware於1205年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾哈姆斯塔爾 利德瓦雷時，他的父親Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby35歲，母親Lady Isabel de Manduit25歲。他和Matilda Peche至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1255年之前在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Ridware was born in 1205, in Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby, was 35 and his mother, Lady Isabel de Manduit, was 25. He had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with Matilda Peche. He died before 1255, in his hometown.

fr.Draycott in the Moors, Staffordshire, En: Draycott in the Moors, Staffordshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Ridware est né en 1205, à Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabel de Manduit, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec Matilda Peche. Il est décédé avant 1255, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Ridware 1205 in Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby 35 und seine Mutter Lady Isabel de Manduit 25. Er hatte mit Matilda Peche mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 1255 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Ridware è nato il nel 1205 nel Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Lady Isabel de Manduit, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con Matilda Peche. Morì prima del 1255, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Ridwareが1205年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアハムスタル リドワーで生まれた時，父Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derbyは35歳，母Lady Isabel de Manduitは25歳であった。彼はMatilda Pecheとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1255年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.Draycott in the Moors, Staffordshire, En: 영국 스태퍼드실르 드라이컷 인 테 무르스
ko.lifeSummary: Walter Ridware(이)가 1205년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 함스탤 리드워에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabel de Manduit(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Matilda Peche(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1255년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Ridware nasceu em 1205, em Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabel de Manduit, tinha 25 anos. ru.Draycott in the Moors, Staffordshire, En: дреикотт ин т мурс, стаффордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Ridware родился в 1205 г. в местности хамсталл ридвар, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabel de Manduit, 25. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от Matilda Peche. Он умер перед 1255 г. в его родном городе.
